channel.title: GitHub Rust Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: jdx/mise
item.description: dev tools, env vars, task runner

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, mobile, and more.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: solana-labs/solana
item.description: Web-Scale Blockchain for fast, secure, scalable, decentralized apps and marketplaces.

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: casey/just
item.description: 🤖 Just a command runner

item.title: leptos-rs/leptos
item.description: Build fast web applications with Rust.

item.title: rerun-io/rerun
item.description: Visualize streams of multimodal data. Free, fast, easy to use, and simple to integrate. Built in Rust.

item.title: meilisearch/meilisearch
item.description: A lightning-fast search API that fits effortlessly into your apps, websites, and workflow

item.title: sigp/lighthouse
item.description: Ethereum consensus client in Rust

item.title: spaceandtimelabs/sxt-proof-of-sql
item.description: Space and Time | Proof of SQL

item.title: web-infra-dev/rspack
item.description: The fast Rust-based web bundler with webpack-compatible API 🦀️

item.title: jj-vcs/jj
item.description: A Git-compatible VCS that is both simple and powerful

item.title: ruffle-rs/ruffle
item.description: A Flash Player emulator written in Rust

item.title: bevyengine/bevy
item.description: A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

item.title: helix-editor/helix
item.description: A post-modern modal text editor.

item.title: coral-xyz/anchor
item.description: ⚓ Solana Sealevel Framework

item.title: astral-sh/ruff
item.description: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

item.title: ankitects/anki
item.description: Anki's shared backend and web components, and the Qt frontend

item.title: rust-lang/rustlings
item.description: 🦀 Small exercises to get you used to reading and writing Rust code!

item.title: gleam-lang/gleam
item.description: ⭐️ A friendly language for building type-safe, scalable systems!

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.

item.title: nexus-xyz/nexus-zkvm
item.description: The Nexus zkVM: The zero-knowledge virtual machine

item.title: emilk/egui
item.description: egui: an easy-to-use immediate mode GUI in Rust that runs on both web and native

item.title: surrealdb/surrealdb
item.description: A scalable, distributed, collaborative, document-graph database, for the realtime web
